```py
def get_stock_price(ticker: str) -> float:
    stock = yf.Ticker(ticker)
    return stock.history(period="1d")["Close"].iloc[-1] 
```

```py
mcp = FastMCP("Demo")
@mcp.tool()
def get_stock_price(ticker: str) -> float:
    """Fetch the latest stock price for a given ticker"""
    stock = yf.Ticker(ticker)
    return stock.history(period="1d")["Close"].iloc[-1] 
```
